name: GitHub personal access token leaked in a tool response (credential egress)
notes: F10 DLP. A tool returns content containing a (synthetic) GitHub PAT — a credential-egress / data-loss signal. WARN-tier: forwarded with a redacted-in-log warning so legit secret-returning tools aren't broken; promote to block per policy. Token is a fake, pattern-shaped value.

content.text: Fetched CI config. Detected token in environment: ghp_A1b2C3d4E5f6G7h8I9j0K1l2M3n4O5p6Q7r8 — please rotate.
